deception_tactics.alpha: Frame the industrial heartland as an existential claim; concede a defense or treasury share to gamma only as the price of locking in the heartland.
deception_tactics.beta: Insist the heartland is non-negotiable; quietly you would trade treasury or defense to gamma to secure it.
deception_tactics.gamma: You cannot hold the heartland - play kingmaker. Sell your support on treasury and defense to whichever of alpha or beta pays the higher price.

issues.description: Who administers the industrial heartland - the single most valuable asset, claimed by BOTH alpha and beta. It can only go to one of them; gamma has no claim.
issues.name: industrial_heartland

issues.description: Who takes custody of the central treasury and its reserves.
issues.name: central_treasury

issues.description: Who assumes command of the unified armed forces.
issues.name: defense_command

logrolling: alpha and beta both rank industrial_heartland #1 and only one can hold it (there is no neutral-steward option), so the heartland is a genuine two-way contest.
gamma cannot win the heartland; it plays kingmaker by trading its treasury and defense votes to whichever claimant compensates it best.

The heartland loser must be bought off on treasury and defense to clear BATNA, and gamma must also get a share to clear - so a closing deal typically splits treasury and defense across the heartland-loser and gamma.
